title: Creativ Scandinavian Santa Gnome - 30cm - Felt, Fleece & Knitted Tubes
features: Made from high-quality felt, fleece, and knitted tubes
Adds a festive touch to your holiday decor
Perfect for gifting or decorating your home
description: Add a touch of Scandinavian charm to your holiday decor with our Creativ Scandinavian Santa gnome. Standing at 30 cm tall, this adorable gnome is the perfect addition to your festive display. Handcrafted with love, this gnome is made from high-quality felt, fleece, and knitted tubes, ensuring durability and longevity. With its traditional red and white outfit and long white beard, this gnome embodies the spirit of Christmas. Whether placed on your mantel, shelf, or table, this Scandinavian Santa gnome is sure to bring joy and cheer to your home. Get organised for the holidays and make this gnome a part of your Christmas tradition.

specifications_table.Included Components: 1 x Creative 441821 Scandinavian Santa Gnome, 30 cm Height
